title: Faster Ghastlings
description: Ghastlings are now faster and speed effect can make them even faster!
body:
---
**This Pack** makes ghastlings faster and lets the Speed effect boost them even more.

Also this pack is recommened to use with the [Explosive Sulfur](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explosive-sulfur) pack.

**Changes**
- Increases ghastling's flight speed by default.
- Speed effect now has impact over the ghastling's flight speed.

**Really Important**
- Once the datapack is uninstalled all the attribute (speed) changes to ghastlings won't be reverted

You can contact me directly if you have any questions or need help: [https://proficode.is-a.dev](https://proficode.is-a.dev/)

---
